tasks.subject: Task 0: Add [cache] config section
tasks.description:
Add CacheConfig (enabled/dir/expiry_days) to Config with serde defaults; update Config struct literals in src/wizard.rs and tests/generate.rs.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/config.rs", "src/wizard.rs", "tests/generate.rs", "tests/config.rs"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop -c cargo test --test config", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cache defaults when absent", "Config has cache field", "workspace compiles"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Cache module (key, atomic store, touch-on-hit, sweep)
tasks.description:
Create src/cache.rs (FNV-1a key, Cache get/put/sweep, default_cache_dir) + register in src/lib.rs. Tests in tests/cache.rs.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/cache.rs", "src/lib.rs", "tests/cache.rs"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop -c cargo test --test cache", "acceptanceCriteria": ["key sensitivity", "put/get roundtrip", "miss on disabled/absent", "touch on hit", "sweep stale/junk"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Split content pipeline
tasks.description:
Split process_html into collect_doc_urls + assemble_processed; keep process_html as wrapper. Output unchanged.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/content.rs", "tests/content.rs"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop -c cargo test --test content", "acceptanceCriteria": ["collect_doc_urls dedup/truncate/flag", "assemble_processed legacy keys+sanitize", "process_html wrapper unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire cache + global concurrent fetch into build pipeline
tasks.description:
Rewrite build_one (cache classify -> global fetch -> assemble -> cache put); thread Cache through generate + sweep once; assemble_document Fn->FnMut. Cold==warm transparency test.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/assemble.rs", "src/generate.rs", "tests/generate.rs"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop -c cargo test && make clippy", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cold==warm bytes", "cache built+swept once", "clippy clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Parallelize Library and Feed pipelines
tasks.description:
generate runs both collections in thread::scope; + Sync bounds; sweep before spawn; sleep_secs fn item. Concurrent-render determinism test. Contingency: RENDER_LOCK mutex in render.rs if fulgur not concurrency-safe.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/generate.rs", "tests/render.rs", "src/render.rs"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop -c cargo test && make clippy", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parallel build produces both PDFs", "concurrent render == reference bytes", "compiles with Sync bounds", "suite+clippy green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Verify real-run performance (no commit)
tasks.description:
Run release binary against scratch no-deploy config (token+locations from danout/rmreader.toml, [cache] at /tmp/rmperf/cache). Cold run (cleared cache) ~15s; warm run ~8s; PDFs start with %PDF-. Verification only.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "/usr/bin/env time -v ./target/release/rmreader /tmp/rmperf.toml", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cold ~15s", "warm ~8s with cached logs", "PDFs valid"]}
```
